content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes users to a custom pre-rating gate that filters low-star raters to a feedback URL while directing only 4-5 star raters to a hardcoded `itms-apps://...write-review` link, instead of using `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview`; description.txt also explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars" (App/RatingGateView.swift:14-20, fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or filtering users before directing them to write a review, and requires the system `requestReview` API rather than deep-linking to the write-review page — this pattern is a textbook 5.6.1/5.6.3 violation reviewers actively look for. Replace this with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` shown to all users unconditionally, and remove the "rate us 5 stars" language from the store description since it also solicits a specific rating.
